full_text: The Era of AI Agents Just Began — and Microsoft Wants to Own the Stack Microsoft has just unveiled the Agent Framework SDK (public preview) — and it could be the biggest step yet in bringing multi-agent AI from research into enterprise reality. It’s a deliberate fusion of Semantic Kernel (Microsoft’s enterprise AI backbone) and AutoGen (its research-grade multi-agent orchestration engine) — merging flexibility, governance, and interoperability into one open-source framework. This SDK is Microsoft’s attempt to make agentic AI production-ready.
